objective: Improve duplicate detection with multi-field matching, proxy client detection, and source prioritization

content: Add stop words filtering for cleaner tokenization
reason: Words like 'de', 'du', 'la', 'le' add noise without semantic value

content: Add legal client words filtering (sa, sas, sasu, sarl, eurl, ltd, limited, inc, corp...)
reason: Legal entity suffixes don't help identify unique clients

content: Detect proxy client names (CherryPick, FreeWork, LeHibou, Hiway, Collective)
reason: When a mission's client is a platform name, prefer the direct source over aggregators

content: Source canonical priority: cherry-pick(5) > lehibou/hiway/collective(4) > free-work(1)
reason: Higher priority sources have better mission quality and detail

content: Weighted similarity: title(62%) + stack(18%) + client(10%) + location(6%) + remote(2%) + tjm(2%)
reason: Title is most indicative; stack second; other fields refine but don't dominate

content: URL normalization with path validation for same_url detection
reason: Same domain with different paths = different missions; /mission/123 vs /mission/456

content: Location incompatibility check before duplicate detection
reason: Paris and Lyon are incompatible locations even with same title/stack

content: deduplicateEnabledSources separates enabled from disabled connectors
reason: Disabled connectors shouldn't affect deduplication of enabled sources

message: refactor(dedup): improve duplicate detection with multi-field matching
